cleavage agent: Two trypsin missed cleavages were allowed
enrichment method: we performed drug affinity chromatography using a couplable (−)-tivantinib analog
fragmentation method: Both MS and MS/MS scans were performed in the Orbitrap
instrument: coupled to an electrospray bench top orbitrap mass spectrometer (Q-Exactive plus, Thermo Fisher)
ionization type: coupled to an electrospray bench top orbitrap mass spectrometer
